upg-001.title: Default paper profiles to Alpaca broker
upg-001.detail: Set AOA_BROKER=alpaca in profiles/paper-dry.env and profiles/paper.env.

upg-002.title: Rotate exposed API keys
upg-002.detail: Revoke Anthropic and Alpaca paper keys in each console; update .env locally.

upg-003.title: Promote L2 repair automation
upg-003.detail: Complete docs/loop-l2-checklist.md and enable L2 in STATE.md.

upg-004.title: Moomoo broker fast-fail when OpenD down
upg-004.detail: TCP preflight before moomoo-api connect (~2s fail-fast).

upg-005.title: Align README with AOA_MODEL default
upg-005.detail: Document claude-sonnet-4-6 default and AOA_MODEL override in README.

upg-006.title: Resolve FastAPI/Starlette deprecation warnings
upg-006.detail: Add httpx2 to web deps; filter upstream alpaca websockets.legacy warning.

upg-007.title: TradingAgents v0.3.0 integration audit
upg-007.detail: Document built-in swarm vs optional upstream package.

upg-008.title: Rebase and evaluate PR #35 (Moomoo broker)
upg-008.detail: Human review of Moomoo broker PR; re-run CI after rebase.

upg-009.title: Workloop discover→upgrade→verify pipeline
upg-009.detail: Document and schedule periodic dependency upgrades via workloop UpgradeStage.

upg-010.title: iPhone alerts + OpenStock + aoa serve
upg-010.detail: Configure ntfy/Pushover webhook, optional OpenStock, run aoa serve.
